events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Two-part trip: 1-2 nights backpacking somewhere warm (Mar 14-15), then Chicago for birthday celebration (Mar 16-19).
events.hook: Book flights to backpacking location and from backpacking to Chicago. Find warm backpacking destination. Arrange REI gear rentals.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana through Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Focus on activities, shopping, and buying 4 pairs of eyeglasses.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto. Validate prescription requirements. Plan activities in Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
